calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement Pursuant To Ccp 664.6; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof; Declaration Of Jessica L. Lemoine; Proposed Order
Off Calendar Sep-18-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF L.A. COMMERCIAL GROUP, INC. A CORPORATION's Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement Pursuant To Ccp 664.6.

Grant. No opposition filed.

Plaintiff submits a proposed order and proposed judgment by email.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
